paragraphs.text: My FATHER is good and His mercy endureth forever. Therefore those who will to ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion to come to His Presence must be merciful.

Psa 16:10 For thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; neither wilt thou suffer thine Merciful One (H2623 "chasiyd") to see corruption. Psa 16:11 Thou wilt shew me the path of life: in thy is fulness of joy; at thy right hand there are pleasures for evermore.
Our potential Anointed Ones are all vessels of mercy which My FATHER had afore prepared unto glory, therefore, the more they need to show mercy to all as they have obtain mercy from Us.

Rom 9:22 What if THE ELOHIM, willing to shew his wrath, and to make his power known, endured with much longsuffering the vessels of wrath fitted to destruction: Rom 9:23 And that he might make known the riches of his glory on the vessels of mercy, which he had afore prepared unto glory,

Mercy should be shown no matter how horrible, unrepentant, incorrigible the person is. As My FATHER is merciful and compassionate even to those ungrateful, unthankful and unrighteous, even so My potential Anointed Ones should do likewise for this is holiness unto righteousness.
Matt 5:48 Be ye therefore perfect, even as your Father which is in heaven is perfect.
Luke 6:36 Be ye therefore merciful, as your Father also is merciful.
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH regarding Our dealing with you in the area of showing mercy to all?

DAVID: The heart is easily polluted above all things, and made wicked by evil spirits. They are like some characters in movies where these people are so oppressed by the evil environment until they become their product. They concluded that to be good and godly does not pay. So they became evil, the evillest of all because they lost faith in men. To them, what is more real is money. There is a saying in Hong Kong, "The people of the world do not despise vice but they despise the poor."

This is what THE FATHER convicted me because I used to pass judgements very quickly. I have learnt and am still trying not to let my self-righteousness deprive me of being merciful to them. I know I have no right to judge anybody. Neither do I have any right to be angry when a brother falls or yield to temptation. We all have our struggles and THE FATHER wants us to show mercy and win them over to good by our mercy. They need to realize, and to repent and cry out to THE FATHER for forgiveness and restoration. Paul was once a blasphemer. He was very unholy. He did a lot of harm to the Children of THE ELOHIM. If we were in the time of Paul and saw how Paul treated the Children of THE ELOHIM, I think it is very difficult for us to forgive and receive Paul. I think we will think of ways to kill him to avenge our brothers and sisters. Nevertheless, JESUS did not think this way. Knowing that Paul had a calling, He forgave him.

There was a very strong unbelief in Paul. Paul did not believe that JESUS is the Messiah. He did not believe in the gospel that JESUS preached. Even when JESUS was resurrected, he still did not believe. When the disciples did signs and wonders, he did not believe as well. He had a snake of self- righteousness. This is the worst snake you can ever find. It is the spirit of a Pharisee, a religious spirit blinded by the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil. They will kill you but still think that they are doing the right thing in The Name of THE ELOHIM. This is going to happen in the last days. It is the worst

snake of all. This self-righteousness spirit is a stronghold in most of our lives especially if you are religious. It is very common because you want to uphold the righteousness of law, but you have forgotten that THE FATHER is merciful to His children and hope that they will repent of their lawlessness. He is more concerned with one lost sheep that had gone astray than the ninety nine righteous that need no repentance. This is my struggle with those sons and daughters who were called but gave up their calling and turned to the world. I have to love and show mercy to them intently. THE HOLY SPIRIT convicted me that it is because of grace through the energizing of THE HOLY SPIRIT that I did not fall away.
We must cry to THE FATHER to fill His love and mercy in our hearts so that we may walk in the Law of Liberty and be free from judgement by showing mercy to all.

Jas 2:12 So speak ye, and so do, as they that shall be judged by the law of liberty. Jas 2:13 For he shall have judgment without mercy, that hath shewed no mercy; and mercy rejoiceth against judgment.
Mat 9:13 But go ye and learn what that meaneth, I will have mercy, and not sacrifice: for I am not come to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance.

JESUS: THE YAHWEH delights in mercy because He is merciful. He knows the frailty and struggle of men. David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH My FATHER's mercy towards Daniel, one of your intercessor?

DAVID: There is a brother in Christ who is seer and I used to pray with him together with another sister. One day, as we gathered for prayer, heaven was opened. The three of us were trembling and I was crying and begging THE FATHER for His glory. After prayer, the sister asked the other brother why he did not approach the throne of THE FATHER when He invited him in the vision that both of them saw simultaneously. He replied that he dared not approach the throne. He said, "If I went up, I would die." He feared THE FATHER and honored His holiness. He just laid flat on the floor and trembled because he saw the holiness of THE FATHER like Isaiah. From that incident, I learned more of the Way of THE YAHWEH. THE ELOHIM chose him as His vessel of mercy despite all his flaws. This seer brother was not a decent person. During his younger days, he was involved with secret societies and vices and had been in prison. He was not living a holy life even at that time and yet THE FATHER invited him to come to His throne. This is how THE ELOHIM sees a person. Therefore, I have endeavored not to be religious. How THE ELOHIM sees and how people see is different. I always remind myself not to think that I am better than the others are. THE FATHER sees the heart and does not how good and respectable a person behaves. He is looking for one who is broken and contrite and trembles when He speaks.

Rom 9:15 For he saith to Moses, I will have mercy on whom I will have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I will have compassion. Rom 9:16 So then it is not of him that willeth, nor of him that runneth, but of THE ELOHIM that sheweth mercy.
